---
name: Bug report
about: Report an SRT/WebVTT file that parses incorrectly or otherwise misbehaves
---

## Failing input

Attach or paste the caption file (or a minimal snippet) that triggers
the bug — an `.srt`/`.vtt` file, or a snippet if the original is
sensitive.

## Expected output

What should parsing/serialization have produced?

## Actual output

What did it actually produce (including any error/crash/hang)?

## Mojo version

Output of `mojo --version`.
